name: Oriental Style Cod
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium red bell pepper, seeded and cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation: 15 minutes. Cook: 9 minutes.
2. Place sprouts in a shallow 10-inch microwave-safe dish. Tuck the onion pieces into the sprouts.
3. Season the cod fillets with salt and pepper.
4. Spread sesame paste over each cod fillet, rolling it up with the paste inside.
5. Arrange the fish on top of the vegetables.
6. Sprinkle the fish with 1 tablespoon soy sauce and 1 teaspoon ginger.
7. Cover with microwave-safe plastic wrap, leaving one corner turned back.
8. Microwave on High for 3 minutes.
9. Scatter the bell pepper and snow peas over the cod.
10. Cover with wrap, turning back one corner, and microwave for an additional 5 minutes.
11. Let stand covered for 1 minute before serving.
12. Combine remaining soy sauce and ginger to serve with the fish.
Serves 4.
